fixes.issue: FAQPage schema restricted to government/healthcare sites since August 2023
fixes.details: Google restricted FAQPage rich results to government and healthcare authority websites. rapidiptvswiss.com is a commercial IPTV provider and will not receive FAQ rich results. The schema wastes crawl budget validation and may trigger warnings in Search Console.

fixes.issue: SoftwareApplication schema has AggregateRating with no linked reviews
fixes.action: Either add Review objects or remove aggregateRating to avoid manual action risk
fixes.details: Google's review snippet guidelines require that ratings come from actual user reviews. Fabricated or unsupported aggregateRating data can result in a manual action. The same issue exists on the Product schema in PricingPageClient.tsx.

fixes.issue: Organization schema missing 'sameAs' for social profiles
fixes.action: Add sameAs array with any official social media URLs

fixes.issue: BreadcrumbList has 'Home' pointing to /home instead of /
fixes.action: First breadcrumb item should point to root URL https://rapidiptvswiss.com/
fixes.fix_code: items={[{ name: "Home", href: "/" }, { name: "IPTV Switzerland", href: "/home" }]}

fixes.action: Change first breadcrumb item href from /home to /
fixes.fix_code: items={[{ name: "Home", href: "/" }, { name: "Pricing Plans", href: "/plans" }]}

fixes.action: Change first breadcrumb item href from /home to /

fixes.issue: BreadcrumbList 'Home' href is /home instead of /, and 'Blog' points to /articles
fixes.action: Change Home href to / and ensure Blog href matches the actual blog index URL

fixes.issue: WebSite SearchAction target points to /articles?q= -- verify this URL actually works
fixes.action: Confirm https://rapidiptvswiss.com/articles?q={query} returns search results, or remove SearchAction

fixes.issue: BlogPosting publisher logo uses favicon.ico instead of a proper logo image
fixes.action: Use a proper logo image (min 112px wide, PNG/JPG)
Track actual modification dates separately; identical dates signal stale content to Google

fixes.issue: Only one Product schema for the 3-device/12-month plan
fixes.action: Consider adding an OfferCatalog or multiple Product schemas covering all plan variants for richer coverage

fixes.issue: No Service schema for the IPTV service itself
fixes.action: Add Service schema alongside or instead of SoftwareApplication

fix_json.name: Rapid IPTV Swiss
fix_json.description: Premium IPTV subscription service in Switzerland with 30,000+ live channels and 150,000+ VOD titles in 4K Ultra HD.
